title: Location column - move address into it from a text column
excerpt: Does anyone have a good way to use Integromat, Zapier, etc. to copy an address from a text column and paste into the location column?

posts.author: phil.haataja (Philip Haataja)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone have a good way to use Integromat, Zapier, etc. to copy an address from a text column and paste into the location column?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @phil.haataja - I think this answer I left on another thread will help you: Can I import addresses in a Location Column on my board? - #3 by PolishedGeek

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @PolishedGeek

The calculation with Google maps is a very good idea, but how to import a location in monday with integromat?

Absent from the monday module, an example with the http module?
